title: Building a Scalable Web Typography System with CSS Custom Properties
tweet: Streamline your #UI design! Master CSS Custom Properties to build a scalable, consistent #WebTypography system. Enhance #UX and easily manage #WebFonts across your site. #CSS #FrontendDev
tip: Leverage CSS custom properties (variables) to define your core typography scale, font families, and line heights. This creates a single source of truth, making global updates effortless and ensuring UI consistency. Pair with semantic class names for maximum flexibility in your web fonts and overall user experience.
